bug-hunter.description: Reviews code changes for undefined references, null dereferences, and CSS mismatches before commits

qa-tester.description: QA engineer that reviews game code for logic bugs, collision issues, timing bugs, mobile compat, and memory leaks

doc-keeper.description: Updates FEATURES.md, PLAN.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md, and master save file after code changes

game-design.description: Game design specialist for roguelite survivors-like games; designs mechanics, progression, and balance
